chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 1648 of 2021. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[s] 06.04.2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Petitioner Tara Chand present in person. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri A.A.G.Sindh along with Hassan Ali DFC Sanghar. ------ The parawise comments are taken on record. This petition impugned a notice for the recovery of the outstanding amount towards wheat procurement issue against 180 days credit policy. The office of the District Food Controller Sanghar was compelled to issue a notice after repeated request and directed the petitioner to deposit the installments amount of Rs.4,26,40,567/- including markup. The amount claimed to have been pending since 30.04.2019, but so far no response was given. This petition was filed after filing of the Suit No.121 of 2021 before Ist Senior Civil Judge Sanghar, pending trial for the same issues. It appears that the petitioner has no case at all to the extent of the proceedings under Article 199. He has already attempted to exhaust a remedy by filing the aforesaid suit before Senior Civil Judge, and he may continue to do so until disposal of the suit. This petition, however, merits no consideration and is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
